description: Remove unused overlayscrollbars dependencies from browser-extension package to fix knip failure on clean checkout

userStories.title: Remove unused overlayscrollbars dependencies from browser-extension
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want `npm run check` to pass on a clean checkout so that the documented quality check workflow works as expected
acceptanceCriteria: overlayscrollbars and overlayscrollbars-react are removed from platform/browser-extension/package.json dependencies
No source file in platform/browser-extension/src/ imports from overlayscrollbars or overlayscrollbars-react
npm run knip passes (zero unused dependencies reported)
userStories.notes:
The browser-extension package.json (platform/browser-extension/package.json) lists `overlayscrollbars` and `overlayscrollbars-react` as dependencies, but neither is imported anywhere in the source code. knip correctly reports them as unused and exits with code 1, which causes `npm run check` to fail (knip runs before unit tests in the check pipeline, so tests never execute either).

The fix is:
1. Remove `"overlayscrollbars": "^2.14.0"` from dependencies in platform/browser-extension/package.json
2. Remove `"overlayscrollbars-react": "^0.5.6"` from dependencies in platform/browser-extension/package.json
3. Run `npm install` from the repo root to update the lockfile

Do NOT add these to knip's ignoreDependencies — they are genuinely unused and should be removed, not suppressed.
